title: Deep Overworld
description: Adds a deep forest biome that contains deepslate on the surface of the overworld.
body:
![Deep Overworld Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/752ef3b3efb7c414890894faa554a1ca4c1bc4c5.png)

## Main Description
Deep Overworld is a mod that adds deepslate to the surface of the overworld! It does that through a biome called the _"Deep Forest"_. The _"Deep Forest"_ also has _"Deep Trees"_ that contain wood similar to warped wood but with a purple outside. The deep trees contain a weird block that acts like the leaves of the tree called _"Decayed Grasin"_. It is actually a part of a family of _"Grasin"_. _"Grasin"_ is a unique type of poison that gives you the _"Grasin Poisoning"_ effect when picked up. Don't worry, though! You can protect yourself with the _"Grasin Protection"_ enchantment that you can put on your helmet. There are three types of _"Grasin"_ A, B and C, each giving a different level of the _"Grasin Poisoning"_ effect. Each level needs a different level of the enchantment to protect you (EX: _"Grasin Poisoning II"_ needs _"Grasin Protection II"_). _"Grasin B"_ and _"Grasin C"_ can generate in patches. _"Grasin A"_ is obtainable through breaking _"Decayed Grasin"_ without silk touch. You can also poison your friend by brewing _"Grasin Poisoning"_ potions with their respecive _"Grasins"_ and an _"Awkward"_ potion (EX: _"Grasin B"_ gives a potion of _"Grasin Poisoning II"_)!
### NOTE: The potions and enchantment are not in the mod's creative mode tabe

## Changelog (Version 1.1.0)
![Deep Overworld Grasin Spreads Update Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/796dc30a680ac6a48c541326ac7b466e2cfe7c1f.png)

### Overview
Oh, you thought decayed grasin was just a _"leaf"_ block? Then you would be so wrong; it's actually the oldest of the grasin family. And this update is here to reveal the entire family
### Additions
- _"Grasin A"_ + Respective Block / Has a purple color and gives the _"Grasin Poisoning"_ effect
- _"Grasin B"_ + Respective Block / Has a blue color and gives the _"Grasin Poisoning II"_ effect
- _"Grasin C"_ + Respective Block / Has a green color and gives the _"Grasin Poisoning III"_ effect
- _"Grasin Poisoning"_ effect / Deals damage until a certain point determined by the level
- _"Grasin Poisoning"_ potions / Gives the _"Grasin Poisoning"_ effect, brewed with the grasin that gives the effect and an awkward potion (EX: B -> _"Grasin Poisoning II"_). **Can't be found in the mod's creative mode tab.**
- _"Grasin Protection"_ enchantment / Stops you from getting the _"Grasin Poisoning"_ effect from _"Grasin"_ items and has three levels. Each level blocks the _"Grasin Poisoning"_ effect of the same level (EX: _"Grasin Protection II"_ -> _"Grasin Poisoning II"_) **Can't be found in the mod's creative mode tab.**
- _"Grasin B"_ piles / Spread out blocks of _"Grasin B"_ that generate in the _"Deep Forest"_
- _"Grasin C"_ piles / Compact out blocks of _"Grasin C"_ that generate in the _"Deep Forest"_
### Other Improvements
- Weight Changes / Should make deep forest spawn smaller (4 -> 3)
- Improved _"Decayed Grasin"_ / Better texture and improved loot table
- _"Deep Sprout"_ crafting recipe / Any sapling with _"Grasin B"_ on top
- Misc bug fixes
### Enjoy :D
